headline: Saylor Signals BTC Buy Ahead of Dividend Vote

article.title: Strategy’s Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms
article.summary: Strategy’s top execs took to social media on Sunday to tout its Bitcoin strategy while shareholders cast final votes on a proposal for twice-monthly preferred stock dividend payments.

headline: Bitcoin Nears $35B Loss in Bear Market Plunge

article.title: Bitcoin risks new 'purge' with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
article.summary: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

headline: Air NZ Seeks 10% Fare Hike Amid Consolidation

article.title: Air New Zealand CEO on Consolidation & Price Increases
article.summary: Air New Zealand CEO Nikhil Ravishankar speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on flight consolidation and price increases to meet demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Embraer Warns 20% Tariffs Hit Aviation Earnings

article.title: Embraer Arijan Meijer on Tariff Impact Within Aviation
article.summary: Embraer CEO of Commercial Aviation Arijan Meijer speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on the impact of tariffs saying it "makes sense" for aviation to be excluded. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Crypto Exposed: 90% Vulnerable to AI-Driven Bug Exploits

headline: Wall Street Challenges Hyperliquid's $1B Perps Dominance

article.title: Wall Street Is Coming for Hyperliquid's Perps Crown, Arthur Hayes Says
article.summary: Arthur Hayes warned that Hyperliquid's core value driver—using trading fees to burn tokens—exposes the protocol to market share losses.

headline: JPMorgan Flags $1B Dollar Reserve Rebuild Amid Crypto Turmoil

article.title: JPMorgan says Strategy may need to rebuild dollar reserves to restore confidence
article.summary: JPMorgan said crypto's outlook depends on Strategy's dividend plan and the Clarity Act, for which it now sees less than a 50% chance of passage this year.

headline: MicroStrategy $11.7B Underwater Amid New Bitcoin Buy Signal

article.title: Michael Saylor hints at fresh bitcoin buy with ‘add more dots’ post as Strategy sits $11.7 billion underwater
article.summary: The post lands a week after Strategy revealed its first bitcoin sale since 2022 and one day before voting closes on a STRC dividend amendment.
